items.html: The matter is that now too, through the Yenika [suckling] — when he suckles the mother's milk — both of them, ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva], must grow. And the female's growth was in that she became as the measure of the Sefira of Tifferet, which is a whole, complete measure — not as at first, when she was a quarter, as the measure of the Yesod, as above. Therefore now, through the Yenika, she grew and became a complete measure, like the measure of the Tifferet in him. Hence she is called the last Hey of the Name, which is a letter in its own right and a complete measure — unlike at the time of the Ibur [conception], when ZA was subordinate, incorporated in the small Vav within the first Hey, and she was subordinate to ZA, in the secret of the Pesia LeVar [step outward] of the small Vav.
